name: Utka Clash
description: Utka Clash is a first person shooter game which features tournament deathmatch where your mission is to find weapons scattered across the map to shoot the bots in order to score given amount of frags to progress to the next levels.
instructions: WASD - Move LMB - Shoot RMB - Aim Flashlight Space - Jump R - Reload G - Grenade F - Use C - Crouch
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Action, First Person Shooter, Gun, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Unity3D, WebGL
